how_to_buy.title: How to buy
how_to_buy.description: With over 100 commercial agreements, we can help you get better value from products and services. Learn about our buying routes and what you can buy.

agreements.title: How to supply
agreements.description: The UK public sector spends billions every year on products and services. Learn how your organisation can benefit from becoming a supplier.

upcoming_deals.title: Transforming Public Procurement
upcoming_deals.description: The Transforming Public Procurement (TPP) programme will change how public procurement in the United Kingdom is regulated.

campaign.title: Digital brochure 2025-2026: Turning your buying decisions into lasting impact
campaign.description: Discover procurement guidance, customer case studies and how to access our agreements
